params.name: Swan Lake
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (1%), Lottery Machine (0.12%), Relic Forge (100 Relic RF), Wishing (0.1%)
params.description:
On May 18, 1876, musician Tchaikovsky wrote his first ballet, Swan Lake.

Tchaikovsky drew inspiration from folk tales to compose this ballet. The ballet tells the story of princess Odette, who was turned into a white swan by an evil sorcerer's curse on the shore of Swan Lake. Prince Siegfried fell in love with Odette when he visited Swan Lake. On the night of the prince's choice of bride, the devil has his daughter Black Swan disguise as Odette to deceive the Prince. The Prince nearly fell into …
